raw_consumer_statement:
On Saturday, XX/XX/year>, at approx. XXXX, I was shopping at XXXX  located at XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX in the XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  While entering the store, I was approached by four males ( XXXX - ages XXXX ) who asked for a donation. They explained that they were raising donations for a dead family member. The males showed me a document with names of individuals who had already donated and I thought it was legit. They advised that the maximum donation someone could give is {$25.00}. I accepted to donate {$25.00} and the males presented a card reader. I used my Citi Credit card to make a {$25.00} donation. 

I entered the store and went about my day. At approximately XXXX, I received a notification on my phone of a {$2000.00} charge on my Citi credit card. I reviewed the charge and it showed that it came from an electrical sub-contractor. At no point did I hire an electrical sub-contractor that day. That day, I only used my Citi credit card for the {$25.00} donation. 

At no point did I give anyone permission or consent to defraud me and take {$2000.00} from my credit card. I provided my credit card to the individuals with the intent to donate {$25.00}. 

I am not sure who the individuals are and was unable to gather any more information from them. 

We did file a police report and this is a to my being investigated.
